fault_codes.description: Combustion quality inadequate. CO2 content is incorrect.
manufacturer_steps: Start check programme P.01 and adjust the CO2 content with the adjusting screw in the Venturi.
Check that the gas restrictor is correct (yellow: G20 natural gas, blue: G25 natural gas, grey: Liquid gas) and undamaged.
cautions_or_notes: Inadequate combustion quality (CO), indicated by F.92/93, leads to an increased risk of poisoning. Make sure that the fault is completely eliminated before starting up the product for continuous operation.

source_refs.source_quote: F.92 Combustion quality inadequate. CO2 content is incorrect. Start check programme P.01 and adjust the CO2 content with the adjusting screw in the Venturi. If the correct CO2 content cannot be set: Check that the gas restrictor is correct (yellow: G20 natural gas, blue: G25 natural gas, grey: Liquid gas) and undamaged. Repeat the gas family check.

cautions_or_notes: Inadequate combustion quality (CO), indicated by F.92/93, leads to an increased risk of poisoning. Make sure that the fault is completely eliminated before starting up the product for continuous operation.

source_refs.source_quote: S.63 Gas family check unsuccessful: Combustion quality outside permissible range (see F.93). Check combustion.
F.93 Poor combustion quality Combustion regulation has detected poor combustion quality

possible_causes: NTC plug not plugged in or has come loose
multiple plug on the PCB not plugged in correctly

source_refs.source_quote: F.00 Flow temperature sensor interruption NTC plug not plugged in or has come loose, multiple plug on the PCB not plugged in correctly, interruption in cable harness, NTC defective

multiple plug on the PCB not plugged in correctly

possible_causes: No or insufficient water in the product
cable to pump or water pressure sensor loose/not connected/defective

source_refs.source_quote: If the filling pressure falls below 0.05 MPa (0.5 bar), the product switches off. The display shows F.22.
F.22 Safety switch-off: Low water pressure No or insufficient water in the product, water pressure sensor defective, cable to pump or water pressure sensor loose/not connected/defective

fault_codes.description: Safety switch-off: Temperature difference too great
possible_causes: flow and return NTC connected the wrong way round

source_refs.source_quote: F.23 Safety switch-off: Temperature difference too great Pump blocked, insufficient pump output, air in product, flow and return NTC connected the wrong way round

fault_codes.description: Safety switch-off: Temperature rise too fast

source_refs.source_quote: F.24 Safety switch-off: Temperature rise too fast Pump blocked, insufficient pump output, air in product, system pressure too low, non-return valve blocked/incorrectly installed

fault_codes.description: Safety switch-off: Flue gas temperature too high
possible_causes: Break in plug connection for optional flue gas safety temperature limiter (STB)

source_refs.source_quote: F.25 Safety switch-off: Flue gas temperature too high Break in plug connection for optional flue gas safety temperature limiter (STB), break in cable harness

possible_causes: Gas valve stepper motor not connected
multiple plug on the PCB not plugged in correctly

source_refs.source_quote: F.27 Safety switch-off: Flame simulation Moisture on the electronics, electronics (flame monitor) defective, gas solenoid valve leaking

possible_causes: Gas meter defective or gas pressure monitor has triggered
multiple plug on PCB incorrectly plugged in
ignition system (ignition transformer, ignition cable, ignition plug, ignition electrode) defective

source_refs.source_quote: F.28 Failure during start-up: Ignition unsuccessful Gas meter defective or gas pressure monitor has triggered, air in gas, gas flow pressure too low, thermal isolator device (TAE) has triggered, condensate duct blocked, incorrect gas restrictor, incorrect spare part gas valve, fault on the gas valve, multiple plug on PCB incorrectly plugged in, break in cable harness, ignition system (ignition transformer, ignition cable, ignition plug, ignition electrode) defective, ionisation current interrupted (cable, electrode), incorrect earthing of product, electronics defective

F.29 Failure during operation: Re-ignition unsuccessful Gas supply temporarily stopped, flue gas recirculation, condensate duct blocked, defective earthing of product, ignition transformer has spark failure

possible_causes: Plug on fan not correctly plugged in
multiple plug on PCB not correctly plugged in

source_refs.source_quote: F.32 Fan fault Plug on fan not correctly plugged in, multiple plug on PCB not correctly plugged in, break in cable harness, fan blocked, Hall sensor defective, electronics defective

fault_codes.description: Coding resistance fault (possible in combination with F.70)
possible_causes: Short circuit/interruption in output range coding resistance (in cable harness at heat exchanger)

source_refs.source_quote: F.42 Coding resistance fault (possible in combination with F.70) Short circuit/interruption in output range coding resistance (in cable harness at heat exchanger) or gas group resistor (on PCB)

possible_causes: two power supplies with different polarities on the eBUS

source_refs.source_quote: F.49 Fault: eBUS Short circuit on eBUS, eBUS overload or two power supplies with different polarities on the eBUS

possible_causes: The mass flow sensor/Venturi is not connected electrically
The plug is not plugged in correctly

source_refs.source_quote: F.52 Contact fault mass flow sensor/Venturi The mass flow sensor/Venturi is not connected electrically The plug is not plugged in correctly The plug is not plugged in The plug is defective The slot is defective (loose connection) Mass flow sensor/Venturi defective

possible_causes: The combustion regulation has detected a fault
Liquid gas coding resistance used when operating with natural gas
Mass flow sensor/Venturi defective, wet or blocked
manufacturer_steps: If the fault occurs again after being cleared: Do not wet the sensor, do not use any lubricants on the O-ring on the Venturi.

source_refs.source_quote: F.53 Combustion regulation fault The combustion regulation has detected a fault Gas flow pressure too low Liquid gas coding resistance used when operating with natural gas If the fault occurs again after being cleared: Gas valve defective Mass flow sensor/Venturi defective, wet or blocked (if the fault occurs again after being cleared): Do not wet the sensor, do not use any lubricants on the O-ring on the Venturi.

fault_codes.description: Fault in the gas supply (in combination with F.28/F.29)
possible_causes: There is insufficient gas supply to operate the unit
Gas flow pressure is too low

source_refs.source_quote: F.54 Fault in the gas supply (in combination with F.28/F.29) There is insufficient gas supply to operate the unit Gas isolator cock(s) closed Gas flow pressure is too low Gas valve defective

possible_causes: A component in the combustion regulation is defective
Contact fault at the gas valve (plug not plugged in correctly or not plugged in, plug defective, slot is defective (loose connection))
Natural gas coding resistance used when operating with liquid gas
manufacturer_steps: If the fault occurs again after being cleared: The gas valve is defective

source_refs.source_quote: F.56 Combustion component fault A component in the combustion regulation is defective Contact fault at the gas valve (plug not plugged in correctly or not plugged in, plug defective, slot is defective (loose connection)) Natural gas coding resistance used when operating with liquid gas If the fault occurs again after being cleared: The gas valve is defective

possible_causes: Active comfort protection mode has detected a regulation fault

source_refs.source_quote: F.57 End comfort protection mode Active comfort protection mode has detected a regulation fault

possible_causes: The gas valve cannot be actuated
Cable harness supply line to the gas valve is defective (short to earth, short circuit)

source_refs.source_quote: F.61 Gas valve actuation fault Ignition electrode highly corroded The gas valve cannot be actuated Cable harness supply line to the gas valve is defective (short to earth, short circuit) Gas valve defective PCB defective

possible_causes: Delayed shutdown of gas valve detected
Secondary light (ignition and monitoring electrode indicates delayed extinguishing of the flame signal)

source_refs.source_quote: F.62 Gas valve switch-off delay Delayed shutdown of gas valve detected Secondary light (ignition and monitoring electrode indicates delayed extinguishing of the flame signal) Gas valve defective PCB defective
F.63 Fault: EEPROM Electronics defective

possible_causes: Flow or return NTC short circuited

source_refs.source_quote: F.64 Fault: Electronics/NTC Flow or return NTC short circuited, electronics defective

possible_causes: Electronics overheating due to external influences

F.67 Fault: Electronics/flame Implausible flame signal, electronics defective

F.68 Fault: Unstable flame signal Air in gas, gas flow pressure too low, incorrect air ratio, condensate duct blocked, incorrect gas restrictor, ionisation flow interruption (cable, electrode), flue gas recirculation, condensate duct

extraction_notes: Original Gemini response was malformed JSON and was repaired by the pipeline.
